stageProfile.limitations: Resident probe reports diagnostic stage timings around exposed runtime boundaries; upstream Nano does not expose every lower-level prepared-input hook separately.

shortPassageOverheadReduction.reason: Requested short-passage overhead reduction was not proven by resident reuse.

precomputeInputsEvidence.reason: Upstream resident synthesize() does not expose reusable prepared request rows that can be consumed by the measured run.

boundedLifecycle.processRestartUnsupportedReason: Resident probe recycles the in-process runtime object; it does not claim child-process restart proof.

warmSpare.reason: Warm spare runtime handoff is not implemented safely in the resident probe.

lifecycleEvidence.reason: Resident probe measured runtime/soak process execution, but forced-kill, zombie, restart, and in-flight shutdown lifecycle exercises are not implemented.

cleanShutdown.reason: Resident probe did not exercise a separate measured clean shutdown check.

forcedKill.reason: Resident probe did not force-kill the runtime process.

zombieProcess.reason: Resident probe did not perform zombie-process detection after a forced kill.

restartClean.reason: Resident probe did not restart a fresh runtime after shutdown.

restartFailed.reason: Resident probe did not exercise a failed restart path.

inflightShutdown.reason: Resident probe did not attempt shutdown while synthesis was in flight.

nano6Readiness.failedReason: MOSS-NANO-6 resident soak duration must be at least 1800 seconds.

failedGates.reason: MOSS-NANO-6 resident soak duration must be at least 1800 seconds.
MOSS-NANO-6 requires exactly 100 adjacent book-like segments.

MOSS-NANO-6 shutdown/restart classifications require measured observed lifecycle checks, not synthetic, planned, or not implemented evidence: clean-shutdown, forced-kill, zombie-process, restart-clean, restart-failed, inflight-rejected.

failedReasons: MOSS-NANO-6 resident soak duration must be at least 1800 seconds.
MOSS-NANO-6 requires exactly 100 adjacent book-like segments.

MOSS-NANO-6 shutdown/restart classifications require measured observed lifecycle checks, not synthetic, planned, or not implemented evidence: clean-shutdown, forced-kill, zombie-process, restart-clean, restart-failed, inflight-rejected.
